title: Formula for time zone
excerpt: It is necessary to convert the date and time in one time zone to another. It would be nice to add a new formula that can take a date value as an argument and bring that date and time to a certain time zone.

posts.author: Asakovich (Lilia Asakovich)
posts.cookedHtml: It is necessary to convert the date and time in one time zone to another. It would be nice to add a new formula that can take a date value as an argument and bring that date and time to a certain time zone.
